issues.description: Independent test verification failed for the second consecutive turn. The Coach's pytest run produced non-functional output: 'I'll run that test command for you and show you the output.' instead of actual test results. Duration 6.94s but no pytest output captured. Test command was: pytest tests/integration/test_ephemeral_fixture.py tests/unit/test_fake_embed_fixture.py tests/unit/test_settings.py -v --tb=short
issues.requirement: All ACs require independent test verification
issues.suggestion: The orchestrator's independent test mechanism needs debugging. The Player's self-reported tests show passes, but without independent verification passing, approval cannot be granted per absence-of-failure guards.

issues.description: Honesty verification shows all 11 claimed files were NOT modified in Turn 2 according to 'git status --porcelain'. Files: deploy/local/docker-compose.yml, deploy/local/initdb/01_extensions.sql, tests/conftest.py, tests/integration/conftest.py, tests/integration/test_ephemeral_fixture.py, tests/unit/test_fake_embed_fixture.py, tests/unit/test_settings.py, and 4 others.
issues.suggestion: If work was done in Turn 1 and committed, don't list those files again in Turn 2's files_modified. Only list files actually changed this turn. If no implementation work was needed in Turn 2 (just re-submission), files_modified should be empty or contain only report/metadata files.

issues.description: Criterion ID mismatch: Requirements specify AC-001, AC-002, ..., AC-008, but Player's completion promises use AC-1, AC-2, ..., AC-8. This caused the automated requirements checker to mark all criteria as rejected with 'No completion promise for AC-XXX'.
issues.suggestion: Use exact criterion IDs from the requirements (AC-001, not AC-1) in completion promises to enable automated verification.

issues.description: Cannot verify file contents for docker-compose.yml (AC-001), initdb/01_extensions.sql (AC-002), fake_embed fixture implementation (AC-007), or lint compliance (AC-008) without working independent test verification.
issues.suggestion: Once independent test verification is fixed, ensure tests explicitly validate: (1) docker-compose.yml uses pgvector/pgvector:pg16 with no fixed port binding, (2) initdb script contains CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector, (3) fake_embed in tests/conftest.py has no fleet_memory.embed imports, (4) ruff check passes.

criteria_verification.notes: Cannot verify without independent test confirmation. Independent tests failed. Player provided detailed completion promise for AC-1 (ID mismatch), but honesty check shows deploy/local/docker-compose.yml was not modified in Turn 2. Without independent verification or tool access to read the file, cannot confirm pgvector:pg16 image, dynamic port binding, initdb mount, or healthcheck parameters.

Cannot verify without independent test confirmation. Independent tests failed. Player claims file contains 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;' but honesty check shows deploy/local/initdb/01_extensions.sql was not modified this turn. No independent verification available.

Cannot verify without independent test confirmation. Player claims Docker unavailable check in tests/integration/conftest.py lines 106-115, but file was not modified in Turn 2 per honesty check. Independent test verification failed, so cannot confirm fast-fail behavior when Docker unavailable.

Cannot verify without independent test confirmation. Player claims ephemeral_pg fixture verified by test_ephemeral_pg_starts_and_provides_dsn, test_ephemeral_pg_uses_random_port, and test_teardown_removes_container_and_volume (all PASSED in Player's environment). However, independent test verification failed, and honesty check shows tests/integration/conftest.py was not modified this turn.

Cannot verify without independent test confirmation. Player claims test_pgvector_extension_available PASSED, confirming vector extension installed after fixture startup. Independent test verification failed, so cannot independently confirm this test actually ran and passed.

Cannot verify without independent test confirmation. Player claims ephemeral_pg_factory fixture verified by test_data_isolation_between_projects (PASSED). Independent test verification failed. Honesty check shows tests/integration/conftest.py not modified this turn.

Cannot verify without independent test confirmation or file read access. Player claims fake_embed fixture in tests/conftest.py with inline LCG implementation, 768 dimensions, no fleet_memory imports. Claims verified by 4 unit tests (all PASSED). However, independent test verification failed, and honesty check shows tests/conftest.py was not modified in Turn 2. Cannot spot-check for absence of fleet_memory.embed imports without Read tool.

Player claims 'ruff check' and 'ruff format --check' passed with 'All checks passed!' and '4 files already formatted'. However, this evidence appears in the completion promise only, not in the independent evidence bundle. Independent test verification ran pytest, not lint. Cannot independently confirm lint compliance without separate orchestrator-run lint check or tool access.

rationale: Cannot approve due to failed independent test verification (the second consecutive turn with this failure). The Coach's pytest run produced non-functional output instead of actual test results, preventing independent confirmation of the Player's self-reported test passes. Per absence-of-failure guards, approval cannot be granted based on Player-reported tests alone when independent verification fails. Additionally, all 11 files the Player claimed to modify show no changes in 'git status', and criterion IDs don't match between requirements and completion promises. The orchestrator's independent test mechanism must be debugged before this task can proceed to approval.
